invariants_acknowledged: Server/Client component split: page.tsx is sync Server Component, api-reference-client.tsx is Client Component with 'use client'
Scalar dynamically imported to avoid SSR issues and reduce initial bundle
OpenAPI spec served from cached API route with 1hr Cache-Control
ErrorBoundary wraps Scalar rendering for crash isolation
PG-032 regression: all 16 existing tests continue to pass

notes: PG-033: API Docs — Scalar Interactive API Explorer. Created 9 files (4 test files, 1 test fixture, 4 implementation files) and modified 6 files (docs index page, sidebar config, test fixture, openapi.json, 2 dependency chain docs). Scalar v0.9.18 embedded via dynamic import with full dark/light theme sync, loading/error/success states with ARIA accessibility, and ErrorBoundary crash isolation. OpenAPI 3.0.3 spec auto-generated from Zod validators covering all 25 tRPC routers (61 paths, 10 domain tags, 9 schemas, 20-term glossary). Foundation STOA initially FAIL (TypeScript import type + unused import) — both fixed and re-verified. Quality STOA PASS (48 tests, 92%+ coverage). All 6 completion gates PASS.
